subcodes.title: Words to several Arabs, spoken on 1914-03-29
subcodes.first_line: While I was living in Baghdad one day I was walking beside the river Euphrates... Suddenly my attention was attracted to wild-eyed girl who was running fast toward the river... Every soul must strive to impart that joy and happiness to mankind the nature of which is permanent.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @stories; anecdotes
